data.raceComments: {"comment":"4. LACHIES IDEAL is racing in fine form having recorded back-to-back wins at this circuit and distance before boxing on for second at Narrabri on Sunday. Up in grade but should enjoy the return to this venue. 8. CORAL CAYS was a beaten favourite when fifth at Newcastle last time but she did have to work. May need luck from second row but she scored back-to-back wins at this circuit last month including a 19m romp over this distance. 5. ANNIE CROCKER comes right into contention after overcoming a back row draw when scoring last start by 4 metres at Narrabri. 7. TOPSIES BLING has been solid in two outings since a win at this venue and her record at this distance stands at three from five.","runners":[4,8,5,7],"exclusive":false}

extraMarkets.name: TAMWORTH-R5-Fav Out
extraMarkets.message: Must finish 1st or 2nd behind N/A Runner
